language.label: Language
language.description: Select display language for the interface.

telemetry.label: Allow sending telemetry diagnostic data
telemetry.description: Allow program to upload error logs that do not contain privacy data to the telemetry server.

powerSaving.label: Power Saving Mode
powerSaving.description: Automatically pause Python sub-service when on battery power, and resume when plugged in.

gameMode.label: Game Mode
gameMode.description: When enabled will disable DML and screenshots on game launch for better game performance.
gameMode.requires_dml: Requires DirectML acceleration to be enabled first
gameMode.permanent: DirectML disabled (too many switches, will restore on restart)
gameMode.fullscreen_paused: Active: Non-browser fullscreen app detected, capture paused

monitor.title: Monitor Service
monitor.tooltip: The Python service handles screenshot capture, OCR text recognition, and image vectorization. When stopped, screenshots and natural language search are unavailable, but existing OCR search still works.
monitor.description: Control the background screenshot & OCR service.
monitor.power_saving_blocked: Power saving mode is active. Connect AC power to start the service.

autoStart.label: Auto-start Subservice
autoStart.description: When enabled the app will attempt to launch the Python subservice on startup.
autoStart.tooltip: Automatically start screenshot/OCR background on app launch

autoLaunch.label: Auto Launch at Startup
autoLaunch.description: Writes to HKLM; administrative confirmation may be required.
autoLaunch.enabledMessage: Enabled: CarbonPaper will start on system startup
autoLaunch.disabledMessage: Disabled: Will not start with system

protection.title: Protected by Windows CNG
protection.description: Your snapshot data is encrypted using credentials managed by Windows CNG. Only authorized access can decrypt it.

session.title: Auto-lock timeout
session.description: Set how long of inactivity before automatic lock requiring re-authentication.

advanced.warning: These settings may affect monitor service performance and system stability. Adjust carefully.

cpu.title: Python subprocess CPU limits
cpu.label: Limit CPU usage
cpu.description: Limit CPU resources used for OCR and embeddings to avoid impacting system performance
cpu.changed_notice: CPU limit changes take effect when the monitor service restarts

ocr.title: OCR processing queue
ocr.pause_label: Pause captures when OCR queue has work
ocr.pause_desc: When enabled, pauses captures while there are unprocessed OCR tasks to reduce resource usage
ocr.queue_limit_desc: Pause captures until queue is drained when above this size
ocr.info: OCR queue settings take effect immediately without restarting the monitor service

dml.title: OCR inference acceleration
dml.label: Use DirectML for inference
dml.description: When enabled, uses GPU for OCR inference acceleration; requires DirectX 12 compatible GPU
dml.changed_notice: DirectML changes take effect when the monitor service restarts
dml.notice: Note: Running DirectML on the primary GPU may impact gaming performance.

clustering.title: Task Clustering
clustering.interval_desc: Set the time interval for automatic background task clustering
clustering.info: Task clustering automatically groups similar activities into long-term tasks. Uses MiniLM-L12 model for text encoding; the model is automatically unloaded after clustering to free memory.

storageManagement.title: Storage Management
storageManagement.description: Manage snapshot storage space and data retention policy

storagePath.label: Storage Location
storagePath.description: Select and migrate the directory used for snapshots and database
storagePath.migrateQuestion: Migrate existing data files to the new directory?

storageLimit.label: Snapshot storage limit
storageLimit.description: Old snapshots will be deleted automatically when exceeded

retention.label: Snapshot retention period
retention.description: Snapshots older than this period will be pruned

warning.title: Warning
warning.message: Current settings allow unlimited storage and permanent retention; snapshots may consume large disk space. Consider setting reasonable limits or retention.

migration.background_tip: You can safely close this window. The upgrade will continue in the background, and search results will gradually populate.
migration.search_unavailable_desc: The database is undergoing a security upgrade and the search index is being rebuilt. During this time, search results may be incomplete or temporarily unavailable. Normal service will resume automatically once the upgrade completes.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm deletion
deleteConfirm.messageSelected: Delete the selected {{count}} screenshots? They will be hidden immediately, and cleanup will run in the background.
deleteConfirm.messageMonth: Delete screenshots of {{processName}} in {{month}}? They will be hidden immediately, and cleanup will run in the background.
deleteConfirm.messageProcess: Delete all screenshots of {{processName}}? They will be hidden immediately, and cleanup will run in the background.

processDetails.title: Storage by Process
processDetails.description: View process share, monthly thumbnails, then select and delete
processDetails.empty: No screenshots available for this process

processes.label: Ignore by process name
processes.hint: Matches by executable name, automatically lowercased.

ignoreProtected.label: Do not capture protected windows
ignoreProtected.description: When disabled, attempts to capture windows that have screen-protected attributes.

quickDelete.title: Quick Delete Records
quickDelete.description: Quickly delete all screenshots and OCR records within the specified range. This action cannot be undone.

extension.title: Browser Extension

enhance.label: Extension Enhancement
enhance.description: Install the CarbonPaper browser extension to capture viewport screenshots with page metadata (URL, title, visible links).

extension.success: Extension installed successfully. Please enable the unpacked extension in your browser.
extension.help: After clicking the button, load the unpacked extension from the path shown in your browser's extension settings page.

tutorial.title: How to install
tutorial.step1: Click the install button for your browser (Chrome or Edge) above.
tutorial.step2: Open the browser extensions page and enable "Developer mode".
tutorial.step3: Click "Load unpacked" and select the extension folder shown after installation.
tutorial.step4: The CarbonPaper extension icon will appear in your browser toolbar.

ai_embedding.title: AI Embedding
ai_embedding.description: Expose a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) HTTP server so that AI assistants can query your snapshot data, OCR text, and task clusters.

privacy_warning.title: Privacy Warning
privacy_warning.message:
Enabling the MCP server will allow any application on this machine that knows the token to access your snapshot data, including screenshots, OCR text, and task information.

The server binds to localhost only and is not accessible from external networks, but any local process with the token can read your data.

Please make sure you understand the risks before enabling.
privacy_warning.confirm_prompt: Type the following text to confirm:
privacy_warning.confirm_text: I have read the warning and I accept the potential exposure risk

token.title: Access Token
token.description: The token is used for API authentication. It is only shown once when generated.
token.show_once_warning: This token will only be shown once. Please copy and save it now. You will not be able to view it again.
token.reset_confirm_message: The current token will be permanently invalidated. All clients using the old token will lose access. A new token will be generated.

content_filter.title: Content Filter
content_filter.description: Filter flagged content from MCP server responses based on compliance rules.

standard.title: Standard Protection
standard.description: Filter content that may trigger AI provider review, preventing your account from being flagged or data from being manually reviewed.

minimal.title: Minimal Filtering
minimal.description: Only filter content likely to cause API request rejection.

off.title: Off
off.description: All screenshot content may be sent to your AI provider.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Category selection has been manually customized.

reject.title: Reject Entire Snapshot
reject.description: Block the entire snapshot from being returned when sensitive content is detected.

remove_paragraph.title: Remove Sensitive Paragraphs
remove_paragraph.description: Remove OCR text entries that contain sensitive words; the rest of the snapshot is still returned.

mask.title: Mask Sensitive Words
mask.description: Replace sensitive words with █ characters; the snapshot and surrounding text are still returned.

categories.cat_05: Content That May Trigger Safety Review

pii.title: PII Detection
pii.description: Detect and filter personal identifiable information (names, phone numbers, ID cards, etc.) from MCP responses using NLP models.
pii.model_note: Active model follows your language setting

save_filters.synced: Saved and synced to monitor service
save_filters.saved_local_not_running: Saved locally; monitor service not running, will sync when started
save_filters.saved_local_unsupported: Saved locally, but current monitor process does not support filter commands. Please restart monitor service

nl.disabled_hint: Requires Python service to be running

ocr.title: OCR Keyword Search
ocr.description: Search by matching text recognized in screenshots

nl.title: Natural Language Search
nl.description: Describe the image content, scene or objects for semantic fuzzy search

sidebar.empty: Select an event from the timeline to view details.

extensionSetup.title: Browser Extension
extensionSetup.subtitle: Capture browser screenshots with rich metadata
extensionSetup.description: The CarbonPaper browser extension captures viewport screenshots along with page metadata such as URL, title, and visible links. Select the browsers you use to install the extension.
extensionSetup.success_message: Extension installed successfully. Enable Developer mode in your browser and load the unpacked extension from the path below.

clusteringSetup.title: Organize Activity History
clusteringSetup.subtitle: Automatically group existing snapshots into tasks
clusteringSetup.description: This version can automatically cluster your accumulated screenshots into "Tasks" based on their content, helping you review and organize your work history by topic.
clusteringSetup.delay_hint: After confirming, clustering will start automatically in the background after a 1-minute delay (to allow the embedding model to load). You can continue using the app normally.
clusteringSetup.info_note: You can also skip this step and manually run clustering later from the Tasks panel.

authMask.title: Windows Hello verification required
authMask.description: Carbon Paper uses Windows Hello to encrypt your screenshots and OCR data. Please unlock using PIN, fingerprint, or face recognition.

errors.not_available: Windows Hello is not available; enable it in system settings

advancedSearch.title: Advanced

search.enter_keyword: Enter a keyword or choose filters to begin.
search.press_enter: Press Enter in the top search bar to jump here quickly.
search.adjust: Adjust filters or try different keywords.

advancedSearch.nl_notice: Results obtained using natural language image search may not be accurate.
rotating: This app is currently a toy!
LLM-powered search will be added in the future!
Amiya, hear me out, I really didn't favor Pelica...

backend_shutdown.title: Backend python services shutdown
backend_shutdown.description: Please enable the backend services to continue using the application.

start.waiting: Waiting for IPC to come up...

step1.title: Install Python v{{version}}
step1.subtitle: Step 1 / 3 — choose or install system Python

pythonPath.label: Python executable path
pythonPath.placeholder: e.g.: C:\Python310\python.exe or paste custom path

venv.discovered_label: Discovered Python versions (you may select one)
venv.note: Not sure what Python is? We can auto-install it. After install the app will exit and must be restarted.

step2.title: Install required dependencies
step2.subtitle: Step 2 / 3 — create venv and install requirements and model files
step2.disk_note: This will download ~1.7GB of model files; actual time depends on network and device performance.
step2.log_start: Starting venv creation and dependency installation...

first_run.title: First-time setup required
first_run.description: The application needs to install essential environment

tasks.title: Long-term Tasks
tasks.emptyHint: Run clustering to auto-discover long-term tasks
tasks.selectHint: Select a task to view details
tasks.noData: Not enough data for clustering. Accumulate more snapshots and try again.
tasks.modelMissing: Clustering model (MiniLM-L12) not downloaded. Please download it in Settings > About.
